prompt: Write a breakbeat pattern — something chopped and syncopated like a hip-hop break.

args.content:
ch 1 Melody
  plugin mini
  strip console1

ch 2 Bass
  plugin bass
  strip console1

ch 3 Chords
  plugin jup8
  strip console1

ch 4 Kick
  plugin kick

ch 5 Snare
  plugin drums

ch 6 HiHat
  plugin drums

arr verse 4 chorus 4

sec verse
  ch 1 Melody
    p q q q q
    n 60 62 64 65

  ch 2 Bass
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 3 Chords
    p w w
    n 48 52 55

  ch 4 Kick
    p x _x _x _x _x _x x _x _x _x x _x _x _x _x _x
    n 36

  ch 5 Snare
    p _x _x _x _x x _x _x x _x _x _x _x x _x x _x
    v 0 0 0 0 110 0 0 40 0 0 0 0 120 0 50 0
    n 38

  ch 6 HiHat
    p x x x x x x x x x x x x x x x x
    v 90 40 80 40 90 40 80 40 90 40 80 40 90 40 80 40
    n 42

sec chorus
  ch 1 Melody
    p q q q q
    n 65 67 69 72

  ch 2 Bass
    p q q _q q
    n 36

  ch 3 Chords
    p w w
    n 53 57 60

  ch 4 Kick
    p x _x _x x _x _x x _x _x _x x _x _x _x x _x
    n 36

  ch 5 Snare
    p _x _x _x _x x _x _x x _x _x x _x x _x x x
    v 0 0 0 0 110 0 0 40 0 0 60 0 120 0 70 90
    n 38

  ch 6 HiHat
    p x x x x x x x x x x x x x x x x
    v 100 50 90 50 100 50 90 50 100 50 90 50 100 50 90 50
    n 42

judgment.relevance_reason: The AI successfully generated a 16th-note drum pattern with syncopated kick and snare placements, closely following the prompt's request for a hip-hop breakbeat.
judgment.quality_reason: The drum programming is musically excellent, featuring well-placed ghost notes on the snare, dynamic hi-hat velocities, and an authentic breakbeat groove.
